headline: Democrats call for review of Paramount's Middle Eastern financial backers
summary: Middle Eastern royal families previously pledged $24-billion to help the Larry Ellison family buy Warner Bros. Discovery

headline: Sentiment Shifts on These Beaten Down Stocks: NFLX, ORCL
summary: Both Oracle and Netflix have faced rather harsh sentiment over the better part of the last year, but each's performance over the past month could be a sign of things finally turning around.

raw.headline: Sentiment Shifts on These Beaten Down Stocks: NFLX, ORCL

headline: Is Paramount Skydance Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: As Paramount Skydance has lagged behind the Dow over the past year, analysts remain cautious about the stock’s prospects.
